result: **Goal: Add a Termite Mound Construction & Stigmergy Simulation mode** — thousands of simple termite agents build complex mound architecture through pheromone-guided placement (stigmergy), producing emergent ventilation shafts, brood chambers, fungus gardens, and royal chambers from purely local rules. Presets like Cathedral Mound, Magnetic Termite Mound (compass-aligned), Underground Network, Fungus Farming Colony, Defensive Fortress, and Mega-Colony. This fills a gap between the existing ant/swarm modes and the construction/architecture space, showcasing one of nature's most striking examples of emergent collective intelligence.
